en_title: Tom Holland Reveals How The Odyssey 'Almost Saved' Spider-Man: Brand New Day
cn_title: 《奥德赛》差点拯救了《蜘蛛侠》新片
subtitle: 诺兰间接救场
opus_summary: 汤姆·霍兰德透露，为参演克里斯托弗·诺兰的《奥德赛》，他请求索尼推迟《蜘蛛侠：崭新一天》的制作六个月，从而让导演德斯汀·丹尼尔·克雷顿有足够时间打磨剧本。霍兰德认为这次延期成就了最好的蜘蛛侠电影，索尼事后也对此感到庆幸。

paragraphs.en: Spider-Man star Tom Holland says that Brand New Day was "almost saved" when he requested its production be delayed — so he could go shoot Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey first.
paragraphs.cn: 蜘蛛侠主演汤姆·霍兰德表示，当他请求推迟《崭新一天》的制作——以便先去拍摄克里斯托弗·诺兰的《奥德赛》时，这部影片「差点被拯救了」。

paragraphs.en: Speaking to GQ , Holland recalled being approached by Nolan to appear in his upcoming historical epic, though he had to admit he was already on the hook to film Spider-Man: Brand New Day at the same time.
paragraphs.cn: 霍兰德在接受《GQ》采访时回忆，诺兰曾邀请他出演这部即将上映的历史史诗片，但他不得不承认自己当时已经承诺要同时拍摄《蜘蛛侠：崭新一天》。

paragraphs.en: "I said to Chris, like, 'Look, I want to do this movie, but if I'm going to do it, I'm going to have to call Sony and have a very uncomfortable conversation," Holland recalled. Which is exactly what he did — and, predictably, the superstar actor ended up getting his way.
paragraphs.cn: 「我对克里斯说，'听着，我想拍这部电影，但如果要拍，我就得给索尼打个电话，进行一次非常尴尬的对话，'」霍兰德回忆道。而他确实这么做了——不出所料，这位超级巨星最终如愿以偿。

paragraphs.en: Sony agreed to postpone Spider-Man's production schedule by six months to allow Holland to film The Odyssey, and in the meantime, the studio's search for a director landed Shang-Chi and Wonder-Man boss Destin Daniel Cretton. The delay also sounds like it allowed Holland, Cretton, and Sony to get a better handle on the film's story — rather than work it out on set.
paragraphs.cn: 索尼同意将《蜘蛛侠》的制作计划推迟六个月，以便霍兰德拍摄《奥德赛》，与此同时，片方在寻找导演的过程中找到了《尚气》和《奇迹人》的导演德斯汀·丹尼尔·克雷顿。这次延期似乎也让霍兰德、克雷顿和索尼能够更好地把握影片的故事——而不是在片场边拍边想。

paragraphs.en: "The Odyssey almost saved Spider-Man because we wouldn't have had Destin," Holland said. "He wouldn't have been ready to make the movie when we were ready to go. We wouldn't have had the six-month period to develop the script with Destin to get it to a place where it is now. And I truly believe that we've made the best version of any Spider-Man movie going. So while it was a tough pill to swallow for Sony, I think in hindsight, they're very grateful that it happened.
paragraphs.cn: 「《奥德赛》差点拯救了《蜘蛛侠》，因为我们本来不会有德斯汀，」霍兰德说。「当我们准备好开拍时，他还没准备好执导这部电影。我们也不会有那六个月的时间与德斯汀一起打磨剧本，让它达到现在的水平。我真心相信，我们拍出了有史以来最好的蜘蛛侠电影。所以，虽然这对索尼来说很难接受，但我想事后他们对此非常感激。」

paragraphs.en: "We are not going to come to set and figure it out," Holland said he told Sony, after seeing the way Nolan shot The Odyssey. "We need to know why we are making this movie beyond the fact that it's Spider-Man 4 and they make loads of money and we're going to just have a big summer. Why are we making this movie?
paragraphs.cn: 「我们不会到了片场再想办法，」霍兰德说他在看到诺兰拍摄《奥德赛》的方式后，这样告诉索尼。「我们需要知道我们为什么要拍这部电影，而不仅仅是因为它是《蜘蛛侠4》，能赚大钱，然后我们就能过一个火爆的夏天。我们为什么要拍这部电影？」

paragraphs.en: "Destin was super instrumental in that," Holland continued, "but it was just really great to constantly be calling up the studio and [producers] Amy [Pascal] and Rachel [O'Connor], who I love, and be like, 'Well, Chris is doing it this way. This is how I think we should be doing it.'"
paragraphs.cn: 「德斯汀在这方面起了很大作用，」霍兰德继续说道，「但能不断给制片厂和我深爱的制片人艾米·帕斯卡和瑞秋·奥康纳打电话，说'克里斯是这么做的，我觉得我们也应该这么做'，这种感觉真的很好。」

paragraphs.en: Spider-Man: Brand New Day arrives in theaters on July 31, following enormous hype, a record-breaking trailer , and countless speculation around the role of Stranger Things star Sadie Sink . It will debut right after the launch of Nolan's hugely-anticipated The Odyssey on July 17, which features a stacked cast that includes Matt Damon, Robert Pattinson, and also Holland's real-life partner and Spidey costar Zendaya.
paragraphs.cn: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新一天》将于7月31日上映，此前已有巨大声势、破纪录的预告片，以及围绕《怪奇物语》主演萨迪·辛克角色的无数猜测。该片将在诺兰备受期待的《奥德赛》于7月17日上映后紧接着登场，后者拥有豪华阵容，包括马特·达蒙、罗伯特·帕丁森，以及霍兰德现实中的伴侣兼蜘蛛侠搭档赞达亚。

paragraphs.en: Image credit: MEGA/GC Images via Getty Images.
paragraphs.cn: 图片来源：MEGA/GC Images via Getty Images。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
